# BP-31 positive: constructor returns concrete type instead of package interface
lang: go
file: bp31/BP-31-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
// Package bp31 contains BP-31 fixture code.
package bp31

type Runner interface {
	Run()
	Stop()
}

type Service struct{}

// Run executes the service work.
func (Service) Run() {}

// Stop shuts the service down.
func (Service) Stop() {}

// NewRunner returns the concrete implementation even though a package interface exists.
func NewRunner() *Service {
	return &Service{}
}
